description_long: This is a plastic beverage bottle with a bright red screw cap and a matching red label wrapped around its midsection. The label features the iconic Coca-Cola branding in white script, along with nutritional information and barcode details in smaller white text. The bottle itself is transparent, allowing the interior to be seen, and has a classic contoured shape that narrows towards the neck. The cap is ribbed for grip and is also red, matching the label. The surface of the bottle appears smooth and glossy, typical of PET plastic bottles. There are no visible signs of damage or deformation, and the bottle appears empty.
description: A transparent plastic Coca-Cola bottle with a red screw cap and a red label featuring white branding and text. The bottle is smooth, glossy, and appears empty.
description_view_0: The bottle is shown with the nutritional information and barcode on the red label facing forward, with the red cap clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side of the label with the Coca-Cola logo in white script and a barcode, with the cap and neck also visible.
description_view_2: The front of the bottle displays the main Coca-Cola logo in large white script on the red label, with the cap and neck in clear view.
description_view_3: This angle shows the opposite side of the label, featuring additional graphics and text, with the cap and neck visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Red label with white Coca-Cola script logo, nutritional information, barcode, and additional white text and graphics.
